nasb.text: with whom the kings of the earth committed acts of immorality, and those who dwell on the earth were made drunk with the wine of her immorality.”

esv.text: with whom the kings of the earth have committed sexual immorality, and with the wine of whose sexual immorality the dwellers on earth have become drunk.”

cnv.text: 地上的眾王都跟她行過淫，住在地上的人也都喝她淫亂的酒醉了。”

ccb.text: 地上的君王与她行淫，地上其他人也因喝了她淫乱的酒而酩酊大醉。”

csbs.text: 地上的众君王曾与她行淫乱，住在地上的人也喝醉了她淫乱的酒。”
